login.subtitle: Generate print-ready scorecards and nametags for your WCA competition.
login.setup_oauth_instruction: Create a WCA OAuth application at

picker.heading: Select a Competition
picker.hint: Showing competitions you manage or delegate.
picker.empty: No competitions found. Make sure you are a delegate or organizer.

language.title: Language
language.bilingual_fr_desc: French first, English second (CQ, QO, etc.)

paper.title: Paper format
paper.a4_desc: 210 × 297 mm — each scorecard is A6 (105 × 148.5 mm)

subsequent_rounds.title: Subsequent rounds
subsequent_rounds.prefilled_desc: Print scorecards for all qualifiers (requires WCA Live results)
subsequent_rounds.blanks_desc: Print blank name slots — fill in by hand at the competition

wca_live.title: WCA Live ID
wca_live.not_found: Not found on WCA Live yet — enter manually if needed
wca_live.hint: Numeric competition ID from WCA Live. Used to generate competitor-specific QR codes on name tags.

logo.title: Competition logo
logo.hint: Appears in the top-left corner of each scorecard. PNG or SVG recommended.
logo.default_desc: Used in the top-left corner of each scorecard alongside the competition name when no custom logo is uploaded.
logo.use_default_hint: Recommended for Canadian competitions. Disable for competitions outside Canada.

nametag.title: Name tag layout
nametag.logo_hidden_desc: Logo not shown on name tags
nametag.logo_with_name_desc: Small logo beside the competition name at the top of each panel
nametag.logo_only_desc: Logo replaces the competition name text — QR codes are slightly smaller to compensate
nametag.qr_back_only_desc: Front = group assignments (FR), back = QR codes (EN)
nametag.qr_both_sides_desc: QR codes on both front and back — useful when logo takes space

advanced.custom_events_hint: Print 4 blank scorecards for side events or bonus puzzles not listed in the WCIF. Group and round fields will be left blank.
advanced.icon_hint: Icon — click a WCA icon or upload your own
